explorations_completed.goal_summary: Landscape verification: confirm beta=4/3 current, verify 3/2 threshold, search for prior H^1+De Giorgi work, clarify Tran-Yu reference
explorations_completed.key_finding: beta=4/3 confirmed (Vasseur 2007). Tran-Yu is actually Choi-Vasseur 2014. H^1+De Giorgi tried by Vasseur school since 2007, but specific H^1-BMO duality angle is untried and novel.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Pressure term dissection: De Giorgi energy inequality, exponent chain to beta=4/3, drift-diffusion comparison, Bogovskii corrector scaling
explorations_completed.key_finding: Bottleneck is distributed (CZ ceiling + far-field pressure constant). Local pressure closes (delta=3/5). Bogovskii corrector fails (2^{2k} growth). H^1 route should target far-field control.
